tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation â€” Types, Schema, Tailwind, Recharts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Establish new type definitions, extend data.json, update Tailwind tokens, install Recharts.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/types.ts`
- Modify: `data/data.json`
- Modify: `tailwind.config.js`
- Modify: `app/globals.css`
- Modify: `app/layout.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] WIP_METRICS, WipMetricKey, WipDailyEntry exported from lib/types.ts
- [ ] ReportData.wipHistory typed as WipDailyEntry[]
- [ ] data.json has wipHistory: [] and rosWithoutInvoices: 0 for all branches
- [ ] Tailwind tokens evs-dark, evs-dark-mid, surface available
- [ ] npm run build passes
- [ ] recharts installed

**Verify:** `npm run build` â†’ `âś“ Compiled successfully`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/types.ts", "data/data.json", "tailwind.config.js", "app/globals.css", "app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WIP_METRICS exported from lib/types.ts", "wipHistory in ReportData type", "recharts installed", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Sales Pages (Daily, Weekly, Monthly)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement all three sales sub-views. All use the same layout with different time-window logic.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/sales-utils.ts`
- Create: `app/sales/daily/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/sales/weekly/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/sales/monthly/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All three pages render with Shell (Sales section, correct active tab)
- [ ] Daily: yesterday's actual vs daily target
- [ ] Weekly: current week vs weekly target
- [ ] Monthly: month-to-date vs monthly target
- [ ] npm run build passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` â†’ `âś“ Compiled successfully`


tasks.subject: Task 9: Root Redirect + Cleanup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Redirect / to /wip/daily, remove all old routes and unused components.

- Delete: `components/Nav.tsx`, `components/Section.tsx`, `components/BranchRow.tsx`, `components/CyclicTrendChart.tsx`, `components/Alert.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
